title: The plan is ready for your review. It covers modifying the existing `Use
description: The plan is ready for your review. It covers modifying the existing `Users.ts` collection (removing `auth: true`, adding `passwordHash` with PBKDF2 hooks, expanding roles), creating the barrel export `src/collections/index.ts`, updating `payload.config.ts` to use it, updating `AuthService` to read from `passwordHash`, and adding unit + integration tests.
